positive: A mystical, detailed forest biome scene rendered in a neo-geometric, high-contrast illustration style. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and centralized, featuring deep, stylized silhouettes of ancient trees, luminous glowing flora, and stylized, graceful woodland spirits (ethereal, non-humanoid). Use a limited, rich color palette of deep midnight blue, sapphire indigo, emerald green, and accents of iridescent gold. The overall mood should be magical and serene. The design must be suitable for screen printing on apparel, with clean, thick lines and strong, graphic contrast against a neutral background. Minimalist but complex detailing.
negative: low detail, noisy, blur, smudge, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logo, watermark, ugly, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, muted colors, gradient, photo, realism, photorealistic, busy, chaotic, asymmetry
